text.title: UTM Taxonomy Discipline Decision Tree
text.summary: Run-or-skip gate based on preconditions, then a second-level question routing to a rule-id conclusion. Minimum-form tree for a methodology of this shape.

decision-tree.root-question: Are closed source + medium vocabularies decided AND link-builder available?

branch.question: Is the campaign-id pattern fixed AND validation regex written?

branch.conclusion: Ship config: closed vocab + pattern + regex + link-builder wired.
Pause; lock campaign-id pattern + validation regex first.
Skip this methodology. Lock source + medium vocabularies + pick link-builder first.
